---
title: "Discovering OERs"
format: html
---

Common places to locate OERs include:

-   [OER Commons](https://oercommons.org/)

-   [MERLOT](https://www.merlot.org/merlot/index.htm)

-   [Open Textbook Library](https://open.umn.edu/opentextbooks)

-   [Institutional repositories](https://opendoar.ac.uk/)

-   [GitHub](https://github.com/) and GitHub Pages outputs

-   Specialised discipline repositories

-   [Wikipedia](https://www.wikipedia.org/)

Search tools often include filters for licence type, accessibility, and media format.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-align="center" width="50"}](/OERs%20for%20users/User-Evaluating%20OERs.html)
